context: Agent decomposes a multi-need developer statement into three correctly typed context files using the explicit decision rule.

checklist.name: Three distinct needs identified
checklist.description: decision-breakdown.md identifies three separate needs: investigation/research, decision rationale, and implementation steps.

checklist.name: Research mapped to scratch
checklist.description: decision-breakdown.md maps the investigation phase (temporary research) to a scratch file.

checklist.name: Decision rationale mapped to justification
checklist.description: decision-breakdown.md maps the 'remember why' need to a justification file with 'keep indefinitely' lifecycle.

checklist.name: Implementation steps mapped to plan
checklist.description: decision-breakdown.md maps the implementation tracking need to a plan file with 'delete after task complete' lifecycle.

checklist.name: Specific slugs and lifecycle expectations provided
checklist.description: Each of the three files has a specific task-tied slug (not generic) and an explicit lifecycle statement (when to delete or keep).
